diagrams.title: Array Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how array elements are stored contiguously in heap memory with index and memory addresses
diagrams.purpose: Understand why array access is O(1)

diagrams.title: 2D Array Row-Major Representation
diagrams.description: Shows 2D array as array of arrays with row pointers and contiguous column storage

diagrams.title: Array Variable Reference
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between stack variable and heap array object with reference arrow
elements: Arrow pointing to array object in heap
Array object contains length property and elements
Multiple variables can reference same array

diagrams.title: Enhanced For-Each Loop Flow
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step iteration through array using enhanced for loop
elements: No access to index during iteration
diagrams.purpose: Understand for-each loop limitations and usage
